{"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-40104", "cvss": {"score": 8.2, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:N/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 8.2, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:N/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 6.9, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:N/VI:N/VA:L/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-770", "name": "Allocation of Resources Without Limits or Throttling"}], "description": "### Impact
REST API endpoints like `/xwiki/rest/wikis/xwiki/spaces/AnnotationCode/pages/AnnotationConfig/objects/AnnotationCode.AnnotationConfig/0/properties` list all available pages as part of the metadata for database list properties, which can exhaust available resources on large wikis.

### Patches
This problem has been patched by applying the configured query limit also to the available values for database list properties in XWiki 16.10.16, 17.4.8 and 17.10.1.

### Workarounds
We're not aware of any workarounds apart from upgrading the affected modules.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00405, "percentile": 0.32532}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-mrqg-xmgm-rc5g", "github_reviewed_at":
